title: Avocado Apple Salad

vinaigrette: Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

steps: Prepare the vinaigrette: Place all ingredients in a glass jar and shake to combine.
Assemble the salad: In a large bowl, combine salad ingredients, then add vinaigrette to taste.
Finish with freshly ground black pepper.
tip: Top with chopped grilled chicken or cooked chickpeas to make it a meal.
